attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
SCGC.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCGC.SEGMENT1, 
SCGC.SEGMENT2,
SCGC.SEGMENT3, 
SCGC.SEGMENT4,
SCGC.SEGMENT5,
SCGC.SEGMENT6,
SCGC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, 
SCGC.ENABLED_FLAG,
SCGC.START_DATE_ACTIVE, 
SCGC.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
SCGC.ACCOUNT_TYPE, 
SCGC.PRESERVE_FLAG,
SCGC.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SCGC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGC
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
				SEL 1 
				FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ECGC 
				 WHERE SCGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID= ECGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
				 AND SCGC.GLOBAL_NAME= ECGC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND EXISTS(
				SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
				WHERE 
				    SCGC.SEGMENT1=NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
				AND SCGC.SEGMENT2=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
				AND SCGC.SEGMENT3=NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
				AND SCGC.SEGMENT4=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
				AND SCGC.SEGMENT5=NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
				AND SCGC.SEGMENT6=NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
		)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CODE_COMBINATION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME  DESC)=1

SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SEGMENT1                      
,SEGMENT2                      
,SEGMENT3                      
,SEGMENT4                      
,SEGMENT5                      
,SEGMENT6                      
,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID          
,ENABLED_FLAG                  
,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
,ACCOUNT_TYPE                  
,PRESERVE_FLAG                 
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE        
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGC
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ECGC 
 WHERE SCGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID= ECGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
 AND SCGC.GLOBAL_NAME= ECGC.GLOBAL_NAME
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCGC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,SCGC.GLOBAL_NAME  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME  DESC)=1
